info.title: Important, Please Read!
info.desc: You are about to create a quantum resistant wallet. Do not send Ethereum or other coins or tokens to this wallet address!

info.title: Anti Virus
info.desc: Make sure that your computer or laptop or device has anti-virus software installed and enabled!

info.title: Passwords
info.desc: Make sure that you use a strong, long password and do not forget it!

info.title: Backups
info.desc: Backup your wallet and keep it safe offline. Keep at least three copies of your wallets in different places offline.

info.title: Wallet Safety
info.desc: Do not share your wallet or passwords with anyone. Scammers often offer to help but will steal your wallet!

info.title: Email Safety
info.desc: Do not reply to or open attachments, links or images in emails that talks about Quantum Coin, QuantumSwap, tokens or wallets. They are most likely scams that can result in your coins and tokens getting stolen!

info.title: Social Media and Messaging Apps Safety
info.desc: Do not respond to social media and messaging app direct-messages from community members or anyone in general talking about Quantum Coin or QuantumSwap. They are most likely scammers who can trick you and steal your coins or tokens!

info.title: Wallet Location
info.desc: Your wallets will be encrypted and saved in the following path in your computer. Running cleaning software can delete the wallets. You should ensure that this path is excluded from cleanup. [STORAGE_PATH]

quizWrongAnswer: Your answer is wrong! Please read the question carefully and try again.

quiz.title: Coin Type
quiz.question: What coins or tokens can you send to this wallet?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. You should only send Quantum Coins to this wallet.

quiz.title: Lost wallet or password
quiz.question: If you lost your wallet or password, who can help recover?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. No one can help you recover your wallet or password.

quiz.title: Wallet Location
quiz.question: In which path will your wallets be saved in your computer?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. Your wallets will be encrypted and saved in [STORAGE_PATH]. Running cleaning software can delete the wallets. You should ensure that this path is excluded from cleanup.

langValues.title: QuantumSwap
langValues.swapEarlyPhaseWarn: This is a feature still in early phases of testing. Do you want to continue?
langValues.token-picker-search-placeholder: Search name / symbol or paste contract address
langValues.token-picker-offline-fallback: Token details unavailable. You can still select this contract for offline signing.
langValues.swap-no-pair: No swap route exists between these two tokens (no direct pair and no route through intermediate tokens, max 3 hops)
langValues.use-strong-password: Use a strong and long password. And do not forget it!
langValues.restore-wallet-from-seed: Restore A Quantum Wallet From Seed Words
langValues.confirm-wallet-description: Check your wallet address. If this is not the correct address, you may press back to review and edit the seed words.
langValues.review-transaction-prompt: Please review your transaction request to be sent:
langValues.send-transaction-send-message-descriptio: Your transaction has been submitted. It can take upto a minute to process the transaction. You may close this dialog now.
langValues.restore-wallet-from-backup-file: Restore A Quantum Wallet From a Backup File
langValues.seed-words-info-1: Ensure that no one is looking at the screen other than you.
langValues.seed-words-info-2: Ensure that there is no camera pointed at this screen, including from your phone.
langValues.seed-words-info-3: You should save the seed words safely offline and keep multiple copies in a trustworthy and safe location.
langValues.seed-words-info-4: If these seed words are stolen or someone else gets access to them, your wallet is compromised.
langValues.seed-words-show: Click here to reveal the seed words.
langValues.verify-wallet-password-info: Retype your current quantum wallet password, to verify that you remember it. Upon verification, your wallet will be saved.
langValues.waitWalletSave: Please wait while your wallet is being saved with strong encryption. This can take upto a minute or so to complete...
langValues.walletSaved: Your wallet has been saved successfully.
langValues.backup-wallet-info-1: For additional safety, please make sure that you keep backup copies in atleast three different devices offline.
langValues.backup-wallet-info-2: And remember you need your wallet password to restore the backup!
langValues.backup-wallet-skip: Click here to skip this step.
langValues.backupWait: Please wait while your wallet is being backed up with strong encryption. This can take upto a minute or so to complete...
langValues.restore-wallet-from-backup: Restore Quantum Wallet From Backup File
langValues.walletFileRestoreWait: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and opened. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.waitRevealSeed: Please wait while your wallet seed words are being decrypted and opened. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.waitWalletOpen: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and opened. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.create-or-restore-wallet: Create New or Restore Existing Wallet
langValues.waitUnlock: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and unlocked. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.name: Name
langValues.addNetworkWarn: Adding a compromised or scam network can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens. Are you sure you want to continue?!
langValues.addNetworkCheckMissingName: No blockchainName was found in the JSON.
langValues.addNetworkCheckInvalidJson: Invalid JSON — the network name could not be read.
langValues.networkAdded: The network has been added. Remember that executing transactions on a compromised or scam network can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens.!
langValues.addReleaseWarn: Adding a compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens. All swaps will run against its contracts. Are you sure you want to continue?!
langValues.releaseAdded: The release has been added. Remember that swapping through a compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens.!
langValues.useReleaseWarn: This is a custom release. All swaps will run against its contracts. A compromised or scam release can drain your wallet of all coins and tokens. Do you want to continue?
langValues.pleaseWaitSubmit: Please wait while your request is being submitted.
langValues.send-only: Send only Quantum Coins to this address!
langValues.advanced-signing-description: Applicable wallets will incur 30 times higher gas price if this setting is enabled
langValues.eula: THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED “AS IS”, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
langValues.select-seed-word-length: How many seed words do you have?
langValues.tx-step-please-wait: Please wait, this can take up to a minute...
langValues.tx-step-invalid-gas: Enter a valid positive gas limit.
langValues.tx-step-timeout: Timed out waiting for the transaction to confirm. Check the block explorer before retrying.
langValues.dapp-warning: Only continue if you trust this site. It is requesting access to your QuantumCoin wallet.
langValues.dapp-insecure-origin: Warning: this site uses an insecure HTTP connection. Its identity cannot be verified and its requests can be tampered with in transit. Only continue if you understand the risk.
langValues.dapp-tx-verify-failed: The transaction could not be verified and was rejected to protect you from signing tampered or unverifiable data.
langValues.dapp-tx-trust-warning: The recipient, method and parameter labels below are provided by the site and may be mislabeled. Only the raw calldata is authoritative.
langValues.dapp-sign-trust-warning: This message is provided by the site. A signature produced here may be reused by the requesting site.
langValues.dapp-deploy-warning: This deploys a new contract. The bytecode is opaque and unverified, and the constructor breakdown shown is chosen by the site.
langValues.dapp-unsafe-chars: This request contains hidden or direction-changing characters that can disguise what you are approving. It was rejected for your safety.
langValues.dapp-chain-mismatch: Your wallet's active network differs from the network this site is connected to. Switch back to the connected network before approving.
langValues.dapp-err-empty-tx: Invalid transaction: provide a recipient and/or contract data.
langValues.dapp-err-invalid-data: Invalid transaction data: expected a hex string.
langValues.dapp-request-unavailable: This request is no longer available.
langValues.dapp-no-wallet: No wallet found. Create or restore a wallet before connecting.
langValues.dapp-signing: Please wait while the request is being signed.
langValues.dapp-err-incompatible-address: Incompatible address: QuantumCoin uses 32-byte (64-hex) addresses; received an Ethereum-style 20-byte address.
langValues.dapp-err-invalid-message: Invalid message: expected a non-empty string.
langValues.dappNoWallets: No wallets found or wrong password.
langValues.dappUnlockFailed: Could not unlock the account (wrong password?).
langValues.revealSeedClipboardWarn: Copying your seed words puts them on the system clipboard, where other apps on this computer can read them. The clipboard is not automatically cleared, and anywhere you paste them may also be exposed. Continue?
langValues.spoof-onboarding-desc: Memorize these three words. Every genuine wallet request window will show them to you first. If a window shows different words, or no words at all, it is fake - close it immediately. Never share these words with anyone.
langValues.spoof-onboarding-desc-2: These words will be shown again every time you unlock your wallet, so you don't have to worry about forgetting them.
langValues.spoof-quiz-question: Which are your Spoof Buster Words?
langValues.spoof-quiz-correct: This is correct. A genuine wallet request window always shows these words first. If a window shows different words, or none, it is fake - close it and try again.
langValues.spoof-quiz-wrong: Your answer is wrong! Recall the three words that were just shown to you, then try again with the new choices.
langValues.spoof-unlock-slider-title: Remember your spoof buster words. These words will never change.
langValues.spoof-gate-desc: These should match your Spoof Buster Words. If they don't, this window is fake - close this side panel immediately.
langValues.spoof-gate-close-if-wrong: If these are NOT your words, do not continue - close this side panel immediately. Only a fake window shows the wrong words. If you are unsure of your words, close this panel, unlock your wallet and check Settings > Spoof Buster Words.
langValues.spoof-gate-select-option: Select "Correct" to continue. If these are not your words, close this side panel instead.
langValues.spoof-close-reopen: This dialog cannot be dismissed. Close the extension window now, then reopen it from the toolbar.
langValues.spoof-training-a-educate: The words shown were NOT your Spoof Buster words. A mismatch means the window is fake - always close it and try again. This was a training check; the request was rejected.
langValues.spoof-training-b-educate: This was an anti-spoofing drill. Your Spoof Buster words were never shown - never enter your password unless you saw and confirmed your words first. A window that skips the word check is fake: close it and try again.
langValues.spoof-training-b-good-catch: Correct - the Spoof Buster words were never shown, so this window should not be trusted. This was a training check; the request was rejected.
langValues.spoof-redirect-notice-text: A wallet request is waiting for you in the QuantumSwap side panel.
langValues.spoof-redirect-text-unlocked: A site is requesting access to your wallet. For your safety, wallet requests are only approved inside the QuantumSwap side panel. Open the side panel to review the request there.
langValues.spoof-redirect-text-locked: A site is requesting access to your wallet. For your safety, wallet requests are only approved inside the QuantumSwap side panel. Open the side panel and unlock your wallet there to continue.
langValues.spoof-redirect-open-failed: Could not open the side panel. Please open it from the toolbar.
langValues.spoof-settings-none: No Spoof Buster Words are stored yet. They are created during onboarding.

errors.error: An unexpected error occurred. Immediately backup the wallet folder at [STORAGE_PATH]. [ERROR]
errors.wrongAnswer: Your answer is wrong! Please read the question carefully and try again.
errors.passwordSpec: Enter a minimum of 12 characters for password
errors.passwordSpace: Password cannot start or end with spaces
errors.seedDoesNotExist: The following seed word does not exist. Please check for typos:
errors.seedMismatch: The following seed word is incorrect:
errors.walletPasswordMismatch: The password does not match what you entered earlier.
errors.wordToSeed: Error getting seed from seed phrase.!
errors.enterWalletFilePassword: Please enter the wallet file's password.
errors.walletFileOpenError: An error occurred opening the wallet file. Please ensure your password is correct and the wallet file is valid.
errors.walletOpenError: An error occurred opening the wallet. Please ensure your password is correct. If you entered the correct password, immediately backup the wallet folder at [STORAGE_PATH].
errors.noSeed: This wallet does not have seed words. It may have been restored from a backup file, in which case there will be no seed words. You may backup this wallet as a file instead, using the Backup option.
errors.walletAddressExists: The wallet has already been added.
errors.invalidRelease: The release could not be added. Check the name (max 60 plain-text characters) and that each contract address is 0x followed by 64 hex characters.
errors.releasePasswordWrong: The wallet password you entered is incorrect.
errors.invalidApiResponse: The server returned an invalid response.
errors.enterAmount: Please enter the amount to send correctly.
errors.amountLarge: The amount you are trying to send is more than the available balance.
errors.noMoreTxns: There are no more transactions to show.
errors.internetDisconnected: The server might be busy or your internet connection may be having problems. Please check your internet connection and try again after a few minutes.
errors.enterCurrentNonce: Please enter the current nonce to send correctly.
errors.gasEstimateError: Could not fetch the gas fee from the network. Using the default estimate.
